blocks.text: Land **consecutive digits** on a line to form a number — and win **that number**. Lines are the 3 columns (read top→bottom) and the 2 diagonals. A leading zero is dropped.

items: Set your stake with the bet ±
A column of digits = a winning number

blocks.text: The **Vortex** fills a whole column with digits, making a number near-certain. It strikes at random in the base game — or open the **buy feature** to activate the Vortex ante ({{cost.vortex}} your bet per spin) and force one every spin. The maximum win is an all-nines grid: every line reads 999, paying {{maxWin.base}} your bet in one spin.

items: **SPIN** — plays one round at the current bet.
**Autoplay** — play a chosen number of rounds automatically; tap again to stop.
**Quick spin** — shortens the reel animation; the result is identical.
**Menu (☰)** — opens settings, the paytable and these rules.

blocks.text: Malfunction voids all wins and plays. A consistent internet connection is required. In the event of a disconnection, reload the game to finish any uncompleted rounds.
